# Islamvy — AI-Powered Islamic Lifestyle App
> The most personalized Islamic companion app, powered by AI and authentic Islamic sources.

## App Download
- iOS App Store: https://apps.apple.com/app/islamvy
- Google Play Store: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.yusuf.islamvy

## Core Features
- AI Dream Interpretation (based on Ibn Sirin & Islamic sources)
- Personalized AI Dhikr & Dua Plans
- Prayer Times with Adhan Notifications
- Quran with Multi-language Translation & Audio
- Live Kaaba Stream
- Muslim Community Hub (Dua Chains, Hatim Groups)
- Qibla Compass & Mosque Finder
- Zakat Calculator
- Islamic Marketplace (Books, Prayer items)
